title: echinocereus dasyacanthus var. ctenoides
intro: Echinocereus dasyacanthus var. ctenoides, commonly known as the chain fruit cholla, is a cactus species in the Echinocereus genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Echinocereus dasyacanthus var. ctenoides include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of this plant may be used in teas, infusions, or as topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
